heading: Assignment of claim
label: 8130 Assignment of claim
text: An assignment of a claim for compensation under this subchapter is void. Compensation and claims for compensation are exempt from claims of creditors.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesDerivationU.S. CodeRevised Statutes andStatutes at Large .5 U.S.C. 775, .Sept. 7, 1916, ch. 458, § 2539 Stat. 747Standard changes are made to conform with the definitions applicable and the style of this title as outlined in the preface to the report.
